title: Knicks & Brunson Tracker
lede: Upcoming scheduled fixtures and Jalen Brunson's recent scoring performance.

highlights.label: L5 Average
highlights.detail: Points per game over the last 5 starts

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: Next five fixtures for the New York Knicks.

sections.title: Brunson Game Logs
sections.description: Points scored in the last five starts.

demoSteps: Load the dashboard using the local fixture JSON.
Verify the upcoming schedule table populates with five games.
Check the scoring chart displays five bars with correct values.
Observe the highlights to confirm L5 calculates to 31.2 and L3 to 33.7.
Verify the L3 highlight adopts a positive tone indicating the 30-point threshold is met.
notes: Data architecture must remain decoupled to allow easy swapping to a live API in V2.
Interface should favour data density without decorative elements.
